source_rationale: For spatial analysis, each cell within the plasmablast subset (defined by CD138 expression) was assigned the median Euclidean distance to the nearest 5 cells from the following subsets: plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs: BDCA2), type-1 and type-2 conventional dendritic cells (cDC1: CD141+CD1c–; cDC2: CD141–CD1c+), sinusoidal macrophages (CD169), non-sinusoidal macrophages (CD169–CD68+), NK cells (CD56) and granulocytes (CD66b).

For spatial analysis, each cell within the plasmablast subset (defined by CD138 expression) was assigned the median Euclidean distance to the nearest 5 cells from the following subsets: plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs: BDCA2), type-1 and type-2 conventional dendritic cells (cDC1: CD141+CD1c–; cDC2: CD141–CD1c+), sinusoidal macrophages (CD169), non-sinusoidal macrophages (CD169–CD68+), NK cells (CD56) and granulocytes (CD66b).

For spatial analysis, each cell within the plasmablast subset (defined by CD138 expression) was assigned the median Euclidean distance to the nearest 5 cells from the following subsets: plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs: BDCA2), type-1 and type-2 conventional dendritic cells (cDC1: CD141+CD1c–; cDC2: CD141–CD1c+), sinusoidal macrophages (CD169), non-sinusoidal macrophages (CD169–CD68+), NK cells (CD56) and granulocytes (CD66b).

For spatial analysis, each cell within the plasmablast subset (defined by CD138 expression) was assigned the median Euclidean distance to the nearest 5 cells from the following subsets: plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs: BDCA2), type-1 and type-2 conventional dendritic cells (cDC1: CD141+CD1c–; cDC2: CD141–CD1c+), sinusoidal macrophages (CD169), non-sinusoidal macrophages (CD169–CD68+), NK cells (CD56) and granulocytes (CD66b).

For spatial analysis, each cell within the plasmablast subset (defined by CD138 expression) was assigned the median Euclidean distance to the nearest 5 cells from the following subsets: plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs: BDCA2), type-1 and type-2 conventional dendritic cells (cDC1: CD141+CD1c–; cDC2: CD141–CD1c+), sinusoidal macrophages (CD169), non-sinusoidal macrophages (CD169–CD68+), NK cells (CD56) and granulocytes (CD66b).

For spatial analysis, each cell within the plasmablast subset (defined by CD138 expression) was assigned the median Euclidean distance to the nearest 5 cells from the following subsets: plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs: BDCA2), type-1 and type-2 conventional dendritic cells (cDC1: CD141+CD1c–; cDC2: CD141–CD1c+), sinusoidal macrophages (CD169), non-sinusoidal macrophages (CD169–CD68+), NK cells (CD56) and granulocytes (CD66b).

For spatial analysis, each cell within the plasmablast subset (defined by CD138 expression) was assigned the median Euclidean distance to the nearest 5 cells from the following subsets: plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs: BDCA2), type-1 and type-2 conventional dendritic cells (cDC1: CD141+CD1c–; cDC2: CD141–CD1c+), sinusoidal macrophages (CD169), non-sinusoidal macrophages (CD169–CD68+), NK cells (CD56) and granulocytes (CD66b).

For spatial analysis, each cell within the plasmablast subset (defined by CD138 expression) was assigned the median Euclidean distance to the nearest 5 cells from the following subsets: plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs: BDCA2), type-1 and type-2 conventional dendritic cells (cDC1: CD141+CD1c–; cDC2: CD141–CD1c+), sinusoidal macrophages (CD169), non-sinusoidal macrophages (CD169–CD68+), NK cells (CD56) and granulocytes (CD66b).
